name: Salmon Rosti
recipeIngredient: 213 g Canned Alaska salmon (pink or red)
350 g Raw potato, cut into very thin chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat the oven to 190°C, 375°F, Gas mark 5.
2. Drain the can of salmon and break the fish into large chunks. Set aside.
3. Mix together the cold mashed potato and thin potato chips. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
4. Add the melted butter or oil to the dish. Spread the mixture evenly using the back of a spoon, creating a round cake.
5. Drizzle a little hot fat over the top of the cake.
6. Return the dish to the oven and bake for 45 minutes.
7. Arrange the salmon chunks over the cooked potato cake.
8. Sprinkle the grated cheddar cheese over the salmon.
9. Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
10. Serve with peas, sweetcorn, or tomatoes.
Serves 4. Approx. 420 kcals per serving
